text:
CO_TRTMT_PT_WK_1_NUM O0401AD PT: Total Minutes Co-treatment Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of co-treatment physical therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
232 INDVDL_OT_WK_1_NUM INDVDL_OT_WK_1_NUM O0401BA OT: Total Minutes Individual Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of individual occupational therapy minutes provided in the first week of stay.
233 CNCRNT_OT_WK_1_NUM CNCRNT_OT_WK_1_NUM O0401BB OT: Total Minutes Concurrent Therapy Week 1
